name: io.github.conorbronsdon/op3-mcp
title: OP3 MCP Server
description: MCP server for OP3 (Open Podcast Prefix Project) — read-only podcast analytics for AI agents: downloads over time, listener geography, listening apps, and per-episode breakdowns. Requires a podcast already routed through the OP3 prefix.

environmentVariables.name: OP3_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: OP3 API token — sign in at https://op3.dev and open your API token page
